title: Moshe Koppel
text: Home * People * Moshe Koppel Moshe Koppel [1] Moshe Koppel , an American-Israeli computer scientist, Talmud scholar and professor at the Department of Computer Science, Bar-Ilan University , Ramat-Gan . He received the Ph.D. degree for his work in logic and number theory from New York University [2] . His research interests includes machine learning and its application to problems related to the automated analysis of texts . Along with Eli David , Nathan S. Netanyahu and Jaap van den Herik , Moshe Koppel worked and published on Genetic Algorithms in computer chess.
